title: Replace contact form with Tally.so form embed

requirements.text: Remove the existing ContactInquiryForm component from the Contact Us page

quotes: removing the current form that is there in Contact us page

acceptanceCriteria: The ContactInquiryForm component is no longer rendered on the Contact Us page
The form section is replaced with the Tally form embed area

requirements.text: Integrate Tally.so form embed in the Contact Us page using either the form URL or embed code provided by the user

quotes: my tally form showing up in that area instead

acceptanceCriteria: The Tally form is displayed in the same area where ContactInquiryForm was previously located
The Tally form maintains the existing page layout and styling consistency
The form is responsive and works on both desktop and mobile views

requirements.text: Remove or deprecate the backend contact inquiry submission endpoint and related types since form submissions will be handled by Tally.so
acceptanceCriteria: The submitContactInquiry function in backend/main.mo is marked as deprecated or removed
The ContactInquiry type and related storage can be cleaned up if no longer needed
Any queries or mutations related to contact inquiries are removed from the frontend

constraints: Preserve the existing Contact Us page layout structure with hero section and contact info cards
Maintain the amber/orange gradient theme and styling consistency
Keep the WhatsApp floating button functionality intact
nonGoals: Modifying the psychometric test or counseling booking forms
Changing the overall navigation or site layout
Adding new features beyond the Tally form integration
